global.description: An ad for VantaStyle that features a solid blue background covering the entire canvas, creating a vibrant and inviting atmosphere. In the top left corner, there is a prominent VantaStyle logo displayed within a purple rounded rectangle. The logo features the text 'VantaStyle' in bold white font, immediately drawing attention. Adjacent to this logo, on the right, is a smaller yellow rounded rectangle labeled 'SALE', which adds a sense of urgency and excitement to the ad. In the center of the ad, there are multiple decorative elements, including a large purple rounded rectangle with a diagonal line running from the top left to the bottom right, set against a lighter purple background. This central decorative element is complemented by another purple rectangle with rounded corners, also featuring a diagonal line, which occupies a significant portion of the area, enhancing the visual interest of the ad. Additionally, a light purple circle is located towards the bottom left of the ad, providing a smooth and rounded contrast to the angular shapes surrounding it. At the bottom half of the ad, we see a large, bold white text reading 'Limited stock', centered within a purple rectangular panel. Below this, in smaller white text, it states 'Free shipping over $25', reinforcing the promotional message. Towards the bottom left, there is a white rounded rectangle button with the text 'Shop now' in bold black font, inviting viewers to take action. This button is slightly overlapping the bottom edge of the ad and is centered horizontally, making it easily accessible. Next to this button, a yellow circular badge displaying '30%' in a bold font catches the eye, positioned to overlap slightly with the purple background, further emphasizing the discount being offered. In the top right corner, the yellow rectangular 'SALE' badge with bold black uppercase letters adds to the overall urgency of the promotion. Finally, in the top left corner, there is a simple black text reading 'UGC', displayed in a clear sans-serif font, providing additional context to the ad's content.
global.main_message: Limited stock with free shipping over $25 and a 30% discount
global.emotional_tone: Urgent and promotional, encouraging immediate action

elements.label: Solid blue background

It is positioned centrally within the bounding box defined by the coordinates [48.28, 135.47, 105.0, 220.31]. The rectangle has a subtle outline and is set against a lighter purple background.

elements.description: A purple rectangle with rounded corners, featuring a diagonal line running from the top left to the bottom right. It is positioned centrally within the bounding box, occupying a significant portion of the area. The rectangle has a solid purple background and the diagonal line is a darker shade of purple.

elements.description: A light purple circle located towards the bottom left of the ad, positioned within the bounding box defined by the coordinates. The circle has a smooth, rounded shape and is centered horizontally in the specified area.

elements.description: A large, bold white text reading 'Limited stock' is centered within a purple rectangular panel. Below it, in smaller white text, it states 'Free shipping over $25'. The text is positioned in the lower half of the ad, occupying the central area of the bounding box.

elements.label: VantaStyle text logo
elements.description: The element is a white text logo that reads 'VantaStyle' in a bold, modern font. It is positioned in the top left corner of the ad, set against a purple background.

elements.label: Shop now Button
elements.description: A white rounded rectangle button with the text 'Shop now' in bold black font. It is positioned towards the bottom left of the ad, slightly overlapping the bottom edge, and is centered horizontally within the ad's layout.

elements.label: Discount Percentage
elements.description: A yellow circular badge displaying '30%' in a bold font. The badge is positioned towards the bottom left of the ad, overlapping slightly with the purple background. The text is centered within the circle, and the overall appearance is bright and eye-catching.

elements.description: A yellow rectangular badge with rounded corners, displaying the word 'SALE' in bold black uppercase letters. It is positioned in the top right corner of the ad, slightly overlapping the edge.

elements.label: UGC Text
elements.description: The element is a black text reading 'UGC', positioned in the top left corner of the ad. It is displayed in a simple sans-serif font, with each letter clearly defined and evenly spaced.

embedding_texts.global_text: This ad for VantaStyle showcases a vibrant blue background with a prominent logo and various decorative elements, emphasizing a limited stock promotion with free shipping and a discount.
